# 10 — The YAML Rule DSL

Coming soon. This tutorial is the reference card for COGANT's YAML rule
DSL: the full schema, a multi-rule example, compilation via
`cogant.translate.dsl`, and a per-rule firing report on a hand-built
`ProgramGraph`.

> **Background:** The DSL extends the rule families described in
> [rules/overview.md](../rules/overview.md) and is a data-first alternative
> to the Python-level rules documented in
> [reference/translation_rules.md](../reference/translation_rules.md).
> Custom rule registration and precedence are covered in
> [rules/custom_rules.md](../rules/custom_rules.md) and
> [rules/configuration_and_precedence.md](../rules/configuration_and_precedence.md).

See [related docs](../index.md) for now.
